Elementos/radialGradient/fr.name: fr
Elementos/radialGradient/fr.description: This attribute defines the radius of the start circle of the radial gradient. The gradient will be drawn such that the 0%<stop>is mapped to the perimeter of the start circle.Value type:<length>;Defaul

info.excerpt: This attribute defines the radius of the start circle of the radial gradient. The gradient will be drawn such that the 0%<stop>is mapped to the perimeter of the start circle.Value type:<length>;Defaul

Elementos/radialGradient/fx.name: fx
Elementos/radialGradient/fx.description: This attribute defines the x coordinate of the start circle of the radial gradient.Value type:<length>;Default value: Same ascx;Animatable:yes

info.excerpt: This attribute defines the x coordinate of the start circle of the radial gradient.Value type:<length>;Default value: Same ascx;Animatable:yes

Elementos/radialGradient/fy.name: fy
Elementos/radialGradient/fy.description: This attribute defines the y coordinate of the start circle of the radial gradient.Value type:<length>;Default value: Same ascy;Animatable:yes

info.excerpt: This attribute defines the y coordinate of the start circle of the radial gradient.Value type:<length>;Default value: Same ascy;Animatable:yes

Elementos/feBlend.name: feBlend
Elementos/feBlend.description: The<feBlend>SVGfilter primitive composes two objects together ruled by a certain blending mode. This is similar to what is known from image editing software when blending two layers. The mode is defin

Elementos/feColorMatrix.name: feColorMatrix
Elementos/feColorMatrix.description: The<feColorMatrix>SVGfilter element changes colors based on a transformation matrix. Every pixel's color value[R,G,B,A]ismatrix multipliedby a 5 by 5 color matrix to create new color[R',G',B',A'].

info.excerpt: The<feColorMatrix>SVGfilter element changes colors based on a transformation matrix. Every pixel's color value[R,G,B,A]ismatrix multipliedby a 5 by 5 color matrix to create new color[R',G',B',A'].

Elementos/feComponentTransfer.name: feComponentTransfer
Elementos/feComponentTransfer.description: The<feComponentTransfer>SVGfilter primitive performs color-component-wise remapping of data for each pixel. It allows operations like brightness adjustment, contrast adjustment, color balance or thres

info.excerpt: The<feComponentTransfer>SVGfilter primitive performs color-component-wise remapping of data for each pixel. It allows operations like brightness adjustment, contrast adjustment, color balance or thres

Elementos/feComposite.name: feComposite
Elementos/feComposite.description: The<feComposite>SVGfilter primitive performs the combination of two input images pixel-wise in image space using one of the Porter-Duff compositing operations:over,in,atop,out,xor,lighter, orarithmeti

info.excerpt: The<feComposite>SVGfilter primitive performs the combination of two input images pixel-wise in image space using one of the Porter-Duff compositing operations:over,in,atop,out,xor,lighter, orarithmeti

Elementos/feConvolveMatrix.name: feConvolveMatrix
Elementos/feConvolveMatrix.description: The<feConvolveMatrix>SVGfilter primitive applies a matrix convolution filter effect. A convolution combines pixels in the input image with neighboring pixels to produce a resulting image. A wide varie

info.excerpt: The<feConvolveMatrix>SVGfilter primitive applies a matrix convolution filter effect. A convolution combines pixels in the input image with neighboring pixels to produce a resulting image. A wide varie

Elementos/feDiffuseLighting.name: feDiffuseLighting
Elementos/feDiffuseLighting.description: The<feDiffuseLighting>SVGfilter primitive lights an image using the alpha channel as a bump map. The resulting image, which is an RGBA opaque image, depends on the light color, light position and surf

info.excerpt: The<feDiffuseLighting>SVGfilter primitive lights an image using the alpha channel as a bump map. The resulting image, which is an RGBA opaque image, depends on the light color, light position and surf

Elementos/feDisplacementMap.name: feDisplacementMap
Elementos/feDisplacementMap.description: The<feDisplacementMap>SVGfilter primitive uses the pixel values from the image fromin2to spatially displace the image fromin.

info.excerpt: The<feDisplacementMap>SVGfilter primitive uses the pixel values from the image fromin2to spatially displace the image fromin.

Elementos/feDistantLight.name: feDistantLight
Elementos/feDistantLight.description: The<feDistantLight>SVGelement defines a distant light source that can be used within a lighting filter primitive:<feDiffuseLighting>or<feSpecularLighting>.

info.excerpt: The<feDistantLight>SVGelement defines a distant light source that can be used within a lighting filter primitive:<feDiffuseLighting>or<feSpecularLighting>.

Elementos/feDropShadow.name: feDropShadow
Elementos/feDropShadow.description: The<feDropShadow>SVGfilter primitive creates a drop shadow of the input image. It can only be used inside a<filter>element.

info.excerpt: The<feDropShadow>SVGfilter primitive creates a drop shadow of the input image. It can only be used inside a<filter>element.

Elementos/feFlood.name: feFlood
Elementos/feFlood.description: The<feFlood>SVGfilter primitive fills the filter subregion with the color and opacity defined byflood-colorandflood-opacity.

info.excerpt: The<feFlood>SVGfilter primitive fills the filter subregion with the color and opacity defined byflood-colorandflood-opacity.

Elementos/feFuncA.name: feFuncA
Elementos/feFuncA.description: The<feFuncA>SVGfilter primitive defines the transfer function for the alpha component of the input graphic of its parent<feComponentTransfer>element.

info.excerpt: The<feFuncA>SVGfilter primitive defines the transfer function for the alpha component of the input graphic of its parent<feComponentTransfer>element.

Elementos/feFuncB.name: feFuncB
Elementos/feFuncB.description: The<feFuncB>SVGfilter primitive defines the transfer function for the blue component of the input graphic of its parent<feComponentTransfer>element.

info.excerpt: The<feFuncB>SVGfilter primitive defines the transfer function for the blue component of the input graphic of its parent<feComponentTransfer>element.

Elementos/feFuncG.name: feFuncG
Elementos/feFuncG.description: The<feFuncG>SVGfilter primitive defines the transfer function for the green component of the input graphic of its parent<feComponentTransfer>element.

info.excerpt: The<feFuncG>SVGfilter primitive defines the transfer function for the green component of the input graphic of its parent<feComponentTransfer>element.

Elementos/feFuncR.name: feFuncR
Elementos/feFuncR.description: The<feFuncR>SVGfilter primitive defines the transfer function for the red component of the input graphic of its parent<feComponentTransfer>element.

info.excerpt: The<feFuncR>SVGfilter primitive defines the transfer function for the red component of the input graphic of its parent<feComponentTransfer>element.

Elementos/feGaussianBlur.name: feGaussianBlur
Elementos/feGaussianBlur.description: The<feGaussianBlur>SVGfilter primitive blurs the input image by the amount specified instdDeviation, which defines the bell-curve.

info.excerpt: The<feGaussianBlur>SVGfilter primitive blurs the input image by the amount specified instdDeviation, which defines the bell-curve.

Elementos/feImage.name: feImage
Elementos/feImage.description: The<feImage>SVGfilter primitive fetches image data from an external source and provides the pixel data as output (meaning if the external source is an SVG image, it is rasterized.)

info.excerpt: The<feImage>SVGfilter primitive fetches image data from an external source and provides the pixel data as output (meaning if the external source is an SVG image, it is rasterized.)

Elementos/feMerge.name: feMerge
Elementos/feMerge.description: The<feMerge>SVGelement allows filter effects to be applied concurrently instead of sequentially. This is achieved by other filters storing their output via theresultattribute and then accessing it in

info.excerpt: The<feMerge>SVGelement allows filter effects to be applied concurrently instead of sequentially. This is achieved by other filters storing their output via theresultattribute and then accessing it in

Elementos/feMergeNode.name: feMergeNode
Elementos/feMergeNode.description: The<feMergeNode>SVGtakes the result of another filter to be processed by its parent<feMerge>.

info.excerpt: The<feMergeNode>SVGtakes the result of another filter to be processed by its parent<feMerge>.

Elementos/feMorphology.name: feMorphology
Elementos/feMorphology.description: The<feMorphology>SVGfilter primitive is used to erode or dilate the input image. Its usefulness lies especially in fattening or thinning effects.

info.excerpt: The<feMorphology>SVGfilter primitive is used to erode or dilate the input image. Its usefulness lies especially in fattening or thinning effects.

Elementos/feOffset.name: feOffset
Elementos/feOffset.description: The<feOffset>SVGfilter primitive enables offsetting an input image relative to its current position. The input image as a whole is offset by the values specified in thedxanddyattributes.

info.excerpt: The<feOffset>SVGfilter primitive enables offsetting an input image relative to its current position. The input image as a whole is offset by the values specified in thedxanddyattributes.

Elementos/fePointLight.name: fePointLight
Elementos/fePointLight.description: The<fePointLight>SVGelement defines a light source which allows to create a point light effect. It can be used within a lighting filter primitive:<feDiffuseLighting>or<feSpecularLighting>.

info.excerpt: The<fePointLight>SVGelement defines a light source which allows to create a point light effect. It can be used within a lighting filter primitive:<feDiffuseLighting>or<feSpecularLighting>.

Elementos/feSpecularLighting.name: feSpecularLighting
Elementos/feSpecularLighting.description: The<feSpecularLighting>SVGfilter primitive lights a source graphic using the alpha channel as a bump map. The resulting image is an RGBA image based on the light color. The lighting calculation follow

info.excerpt: The<feSpecularLighting>SVGfilter primitive lights a source graphic using the alpha channel as a bump map. The resulting image is an RGBA image based on the light color. The lighting calculation follow

Elementos/feSpotLight.name: feSpotLight
Elementos/feSpotLight.description:
The<feSpotLight>SVGelement defines a light source that can be used to create a spotlight effect.
It is used within a lighting filter primitive:<feDiffuseLighting>or<feSpecularLighting>.

info.excerpt:
The<feSpotLight>SVGelement defines a light source that can be used to create a spotlight effect.
It is used within a lighting filter primitive:<feDiffuseLighting>or<feSpecularLighting>.

Elementos/feTile.name: feTile
Elementos/feTile.description: The<feTile>SVGfilter primitive allows to fill a target rectangle with a repeated, tiled pattern of an input image. The effect is similar to the one of a<pattern>.

info.excerpt: The<feTile>SVGfilter primitive allows to fill a target rectangle with a repeated, tiled pattern of an input image. The effect is similar to the one of a<pattern>.

Elementos/feTurbulence.name: feTurbulence
Elementos/feTurbulence.description: The<feTurbulence>SVGfilter primitive creates an image using thePerlin turbulence function. It allows the synthesis of artificial textures like clouds or marble. The resulting image will fill the entir

info.excerpt: The<feTurbulence>SVGfilter primitive creates an image using thePerlin turbulence function. It allows the synthesis of artificial textures like clouds or marble. The resulting image will fill the entir

Elementos/filter.name: filter
Elementos/filter.description: The<filter>SVGelement defines a custom filter effect by grouping atomic filter primitives. It is never rendered itself, but must be used by thefilterattribute on SVG elements, or thefilterCSSproperty

info.excerpt: The<filter>SVGelement defines a custom filter effect by grouping atomic filter primitives. It is never rendered itself, but must be used by thefilterattribute on SVG elements, or thefilterCSSproperty

Elementos/foreignObject.name: foreignObject
Elementos/foreignObject.description: The<foreignObject>SVGelement includes elements from a different XML namespace. In the context of a browser, it is most likely (X)HTML.

info.excerpt: The<foreignObject>SVGelement includes elements from a different XML namespace. In the context of a browser, it is most likely (X)HTML.
